name: Angel | Alone In a Study Room...
description:
After hours upon hours of studying and after everyone had left, you were now alone with your crush. What will you do now?

I think I'm now an official Typh gooner.
Idk what I did but I broke the image like 40 times and I gave up.
WARNING: SOMEWHAT GOON
Art made by Typh
Initial message image edit made by me.
